title: Name resolution fails when table name is a prefix of another table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, c VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE t2 (a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
CREATE TABLE t2x (b INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, d DOUBLE PRECISION);
SELECT t1.a FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.a = t2.a JOIN t2x ON t2.b = t2x.b;
key_bug_features: Name conflict with table prefixes in SELECT statements
